texto: Well when my death is in front, I just want to turn back to my life, And say the last thing, looking in to its lens that, “Life oh my life, Nobody would have ever painted this life as beautiful as i did”. Good Bye-Ravi
explicacao: Citação de Ravi sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Well when my death is in front, I just want to turn back to my life, And say the last thing, look…” articula reflexao, quote, death em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao.
